title: krameria spartioides
intro: Krameria spartioides, also known as 'Rhatany', is a plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The roots of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits associated with Krameria spartioides include its ability to treat mouth sores, gum inflammation, and other oral health issues. Krameria spartioides can be prepared as a tincture, powder, or tea for its medicinal use.
